calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn & Mtn For Award Of Post Judgment Attorney'S Fees
Off Calendar Apr-10-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association's motion for post judgment attorneys fees is granted in the amount of $1,800. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.

Hearing On Order To Show Cause Why Defendant Should Not Be Held In Contemp
Off Calendar Feb-29-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association's motion for an order to show cause re: CONTEMPT, is ordered off calendar for failure to provide proof of personal service. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.

Notice And Motion For Osc Why Deft Should Not Be Held In Contempt
Off Calendar Jan-15-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. PlaintiffCreditors Trade Association's motion for an order to show cause why defendant should not be held in contempt is granted. Plaintiff shall make personal service of the Order To Show Cause no later than January 31, 2008 for a hearing date of February 29, 2008 at 9:00 a.m. in Department Room 610. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions;
Off Calendar Aug-10-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association's motion to compel responses to post judgment interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses and produce documents within 21 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $340 shall be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
